# Callout Examples

> [!NOTE] A simple note
> This is the note body.
> It spans multiple lines.

> [!WARNING]
> No title text, just a warning body.

> [!TIP]+ Foldable open
> This callout is foldable (open by default).

> [!DANGER]- Foldable closed
> This callout is foldable (closed by default).

> [!INFO] With nested content
> First paragraph.
>
> Second paragraph with **bold** and *italic*.
>
> - List item 1
> - List item 2
